name: Al Magroud
overview: Bo Laish is a 50-year-old man besieged by debt and wants to escape these tragedies. He resorts to small projects and starts moving from one failed project to another that is more failed and continues in the game of losing projects until it reaches a dead end.

trailers.title: مسلسل المقرود - الحلقة 1 - داود حسين و محمد الحملي
